prd_refs: PRD §16 v0.4 undo metadata for benign mutations (line 2942)
description: For each benign mutation, record an inverse plan (delete created file, restore moved item, etc.) in the transcript. `Invoke-SlashOpsUndo` reads the latest mutation entry and offers to apply the inverse.
notes: Not every mutation is undoable; document which kinds are supported and refuse the rest.
steps: TDD: Created PDF mutation records `delete <path>` undo.
TDD: Moved file mutation records `move back` undo.
TDD: Undo refuses if file state has changed since execution.
Author `New-UndoPlan.ps1` for the supported mutation kinds.
Author `Invoke-SlashOpsUndo.ps1` reading transcript and applying inverse with confirmation.
name: [ma-03] Undo metadata for benign mutations
